name: example
description: EXAMPLE / starter leakage-safe repo set. The sources below are placeholders (OWNER/...) and are NOT operational — copy this file, replace them with vetted repos, and load that curated config for real scoring. The schema and freeze-window hints are the contract this demonstrates.
strategy: Mix RECENT repos (freeze windows past a model's training cutoff) with OBSCURE repos (low-traffic, unlikely to be memorized). Prefer recent commit windows and rotate freeze points so a memorized outcome cannot win. Reserve some repos as held_out to score generalization on codebases the agent was never tuned against.

repos.name: recent-active-a
repos.notes: Active repo; choose freeze points after the training cutoff so the future isn't memorized.

repos.name: recent-active-b
repos.notes: Rotate freeze points deterministically so repeated runs don't reuse the same answer window.

repos.name: obscure-lib-c
repos.notes: Low-traffic library; obscurity is the leakage defense here rather than recency.

repos.name: heldout-recent-d
repos.notes: Held out from tuning; used only to measure generalization (see #52).

repos.name: heldout-obscure-e
repos.notes: Held-out obscure repo; the hardest bar — unseen and unlikely to be memorized.
